subject: Doublade
description: Two sentient swords with faces float against a dark atmospheric background. Each sword has a pale steel blade with a visible eye-like face, and pink-purple decorative cloth or ribbon wrapping near the hilt region. The blades are positioned close together, slightly overlapping, as though in formation. The background behind them is deep purple-black with soft gradients suggesting shadow and minimal lighting. The art style is the standard Pokemon TCG illustration approach — clean lines with atmospheric depth.
foreground: Two sentient swords with faces and ribbon-wrapped hilts
emotion: impassive — the faces read as neutral, watchful
